revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''歳破神'''（さいはしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の一人である。暦本によっては'''さい...'
revision.text:
'''歳破神'''（さいはしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の一人である。暦本によっては'''さいは'''と書くこともある。この神の[[本地]]は河伯大水神とされる。
歳破神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、同じ八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]が在位する[[方角]]の反対側の方角に在位するが、太歳神に攻められ破られることがほとんどであり、凶神とされる。なお、[[九星気学]]における方位学での'''[[歳破]]'''（さいは）とは別である。
この神は、[[土]]の性格を有しており、この神が在位する方角に向かって動土（土地の造成や庭造りなど土を動かすこと）や[[建築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[婚姻]]、[[旅行]]（特に[[船舶]]による旅行）は避けたほうがよいとされる。これを犯すと家や会社を代表するものに害が及ぶとされる。また、[[ペット]]や[[家畜]]を求めることも凶とされる。
==歳破神の在位== 太歳神が十二支と同じ方角に在位するが、歳破神はその反対側の方角に在位する。 *子→午 *丑→未 *寅→申 *卯→酉 *辰→戌 *巳→亥 *午→子 *未→丑 *申→寅 *酉→卯 *戌→辰 *亥→巳
==関連項目== *[[八将神]] *[[方位神]] *[[歳破]]・[[月破]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:さいはしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

revision.comment: Created page with "[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God. Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resi..."
revision.text:
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}
[[Category:Deities in Onmyōdō]] [[Category:Saturn deities]] {{Japan-culture-stub}} [[ja:歳破神]]

[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)

[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "八将神}}" to "八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}}"
revision.text:
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地|12=draft}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo (Chinese deity)|ja|河伯|12=draft}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星|12=draft}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisai Shin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin|12=draft}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisai Shin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星気学|12=draft}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土|12=draft}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=draft}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|construction|ja|建築|12=draft}}, {{ill|moving|ja|引越し|12=draft}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=draft}}, or {{ill|travel|ja|旅行|12=draft}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|pets|ja|ペット|12=draft}} or {{ill|livestock|ja|家畜|12=draft}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisai Shin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支|12=draft}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|12=draft}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=draft}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=draft}}
<!--Saipa-shin-->
<!--Saipa-shin-->
<!--Saipa-shin-->
<!--Saipa-shin-->
<!--Saipa-shin-->
<!--Saipa-shin-->

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|歳破神]] '''歳破神'''（さいはしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の一人である。暦本によっては'''さいは'''と書くこともある。この神の[[本地]]は河伯大水神とされる。
歳破神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、同じ八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]が在位する[[方位|方角]]の反対側の方角に在位するが、太歳神に攻められ破られることがほとんどであり、凶神とされる。なお、[[九星気学]]における方位学での'''[[歳破]]'''（さいは）とは別である。
この神は、[[土]]の性格を有しており、この神が在位する方角に向かって動土（土地の造成や庭造りなど土を動かすこと）や[[建築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[結婚|婚姻]]、[[旅行]]（特に[[船舶]]による旅行）は避けたほうがよいとされる。これを犯すと家や会社を代表するものに害が及ぶとされる。また、[[ペット]]や[[家畜]]を求めることも凶とされる。
== 歳破神の在位 == 太歳神が十二支と同じ方角に在位するが、歳破神はその反対側の方角に在位する。 *子→午 *丑→未 *寅→申 *卯→酉 *辰→戌 *巳→亥 *午→子 *未→丑 *申→寅 *酉→卯 *戌→辰 *亥→巳
== 関連項目 == *[[八将神]] *[[方位神]] *[[歳破]]・[[月破]]
{{Japan-culture-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:さいはしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:土星神]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}}

== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60156]] Wikidata name: Saihajin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] of this deity is identified as [[:en:Hebo|Hebo (Chinese deity)]], the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in [[:en:Flying Star Feng Shui|Nine Star Ki]], the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), [[:en:Architecture|construction]], [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or [[:en:Travel|travel]], particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking [[:en:Pet|pets]] or [[:en:Livestock|livestock]] in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

The {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo|en|Hebo|WD=Q10521939|lt=Hebo (Chinese deity)}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Flying Star Feng Shui|en|Flying Star Feng Shui|WD=Q9384721|lt=Nine Star Ki}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|Architecture|en|Architecture|WD=Q12271|lt=construction}}, {{ill|Relocation (personal)|en|Relocation (personal)|WD=Q2918584|lt=moving}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or {{ill|Travel|en|Travel|WD=Q61509|lt=travel}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|Pet|en|Pet|WD=Q39201|lt=pets}} or {{ill|Livestock|en|Livestock|WD=Q103459|lt=livestock}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}
