revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Immanuelle moved page [[Saihajin]] to [[Saiha Shin]]: Text replacement - "Saihajin" to "Saiha Shin"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]]
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo|en|Hebo|WD=Q10521939|lt=Hebo (Chinese deity)}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Flying Star Feng Shui|en|Flying Star Feng Shui|WD=Q9384721|lt=Nine Star Ki}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|Architecture|en|Architecture|WD=Q12271|lt=construction}}, {{ill|Relocation (personal)|en|Relocation (personal)|WD=Q2918584|lt=moving}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or {{ill|Travel|en|Travel|WD=Q61509|lt=travel}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|Pet|en|Pet|WD=Q39201|lt=pets}} or {{ill|Livestock|en|Livestock|WD=Q103459|lt=livestock}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}}
{{translated page|ja|歳破神|version=86525262|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳破神]][[zh:歲破神]]
[[File:God of Saiha.png|thumb|right|170px|Saiha Shin]] '''Saiha Shin''' (歳破神, さいはしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいは" (Saiha). The {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji|1=Honji suijaku}} of this deity is identified as {{ill|Hebo|en|Hebo|WD=Q10521939|lt=Hebo (Chinese deity)|1=Hebo}}, the Great Water God.
Saiha Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn|1=Saturn}} (鎮星). This deity resides in the direction opposite that of {{ill|Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin (Tai Sui)|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, another of the Eight Guardian Deities. However, it is said that Saiha Shin is often attacked and overpowered by Taisaijin, which makes Saiha Shin a malevolent deity. Note that in {{ill|Flying Star Feng Shui|en|Flying Star Feng Shui|WD=Q9384721|lt=Nine Star Ki|1=Flying Star Feng Shui}}, the directional term '''Saiha''' (歳破) is a distinct concept from the deity Saiha Shin.
Saiha Shin embodies the characteristics of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is considered inauspicious to perform actions like {{ill|earthworks|ja|動土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthworks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., land preparation or gardening), {{ill|Architecture|en|Architecture|WD=Q12271|lt=construction|1=Architecture}}, {{ill|Relocation (personal)|en|Relocation (personal)|WD=Q2918584|lt=moving|1=Relocation (personal)}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|婚姻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marriage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 結婚|1=Marriage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8445}}, or {{ill|Travel|en|Travel|WD=Q61509|lt=travel|1=Travel}}, particularly by ship, in the direction of Saiha Shin's presence. Violating this prohibition is said to bring harm to the head of a household or company. Additionally, seeking {{ill|Pet|en|Pet|WD=Q39201|lt=pets|1=Pet}} or {{ill|Livestock|en|Livestock|WD=Q103459|lt=livestock|1=Livestock}} in the direction of this deity is considered unfavorable.
== Saiha Shin's Position == Saiha Shin resides in the direction opposite that of Taisaijin, which aligns with the year’s {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}}: * Rat (子) → Horse (午) * Ox (丑) → Goat (未) * Tiger (寅) → Monkey (申) * Rabbit (卯) → Rooster (酉) * Dragon (辰) → Dog (戌) * Snake (巳) → Pig (亥) * Horse (午) → Rat (子) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rabbit (卯) * Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) * Pig (亥) → Snake (巳) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}・{{ill|Geppei|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geppei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11548077}}
